lost_reasons.description: Special offer expired before lead committed
lost_reasons.prevention: Set deadline BEFORE the lead’s gating event (tenant vacates, renovation completes, etc). A deadline that arrives after the gate is irrelevant.
lost_reasons.lesson: Deadline + gating event timing is the core conversion variable. Sequence matters.

lost_reasons.description: Key decision-maker not in meeting; never secured agreement
lost_reasons.prevention: At booking stage: 'Is your partner or co-owner involved? If so, can they join the meeting?' Never close on one party alone.
lost_reasons.lesson: Single-party meetings on couples have 60%+ abandonment rate.

lost_reasons.description: Lead chose another provider (developer affiliate or other agent)
lost_reasons.prevention: Explicitly call out competitor omissions (cleaning costs, realistic occupancy). Don’t assume lead will discover the gap themselves.
lost_reasons.lesson: Developer affiliates win by being closest at exchange. Stayful must sign before exchange wherever possible.

lost_reasons.description: Lead wants guaranteed rent which Stayful cannot offer on 1-bed properties
lost_reasons.prevention: Pre-qualify on first call: 'Are you looking for fixed or variable income?' If fixed + 1-bed: redirect immediately.
lost_reasons.lesson: No amount of meeting time converts a guaranteed-rent seeker if the product doesn’t exist for their property size.

lost_reasons.description: R2R deal structure leaves insufficient margin after rent + management fee
lost_reasons.prevention: Pre-qualify R2R viability before booking meeting: ask rent + bills. If STL net minus management fee minus rent leaves <£2k/yr, decline or redirect.
lost_reasons.lesson: R2R deals need >£3k/yr margin to be worth the management complexity.

lost_reasons.description: Tenant renewed their tenancy, removing the STL opportunity
lost_reasons.prevention: Get agreement signed with deferred start before tenant decision. Once tenant renews, the window closes entirely.

lost_reasons.description: Property owned by third party (e.g., mother) with remote principal requiring refurbishment
lost_reasons.lesson: Multiple complexity factors combined (third-party owner + overseas + refurbishment) rarely convert.

re_engage_candidates.name: Nina Rueschen
re_engage_candidates.reason: Strong profile (no mortgage, £39k net, Swiss owner). May return if competitor disappoints.
